notes: D13 release layers and value priorities covered
stage 9 writeback source contract hard-fail assertions added
stage 9 final internal governed alignment suites added

policy executor and runtime validator suites added

stage8 compliance lattice candidate/execution split added
stage8 pre-route/internal surface/operator regression closure tightened

suites.title: 单一事实源与文档口径一致性
checks: single l0 working master present
single formal d13 source present
decision table references existing decision ids
no duplicate object vocabulary

suites.title: 对象与真相层回归
checks: schema required fields
lineage minimum fields
version and clock object consistency
truth-to-fact consumer direction

suites.title: 阶段 1-2 来源覆盖与采集链回归
checks: source family/platform/region/coverage enums present
collection_state transitions valid
default_route uses route_type
coverage downgrade/review rules exist
review/block mapped to collection_state

suites.title: 阶段 7 商业封装状态机回归
checks: lead_status transitions valid
saleability_status transitions valid
offer_recommendation_state transitions valid
sales catalogs entries complete
buyer_fit dimensions have formal derivation sources
expected bands and why_recommended are runtime-derived from formal policies

suites.title: 阶段 8 触达状态机与合规回归
checks: contact_target_status transitions valid
plan_status transitions valid
touch_record_state transitions valid
contact compliance matrix enforced
internal preview only enforced

suites.title: 阶段 8 合规模型一致性回归
checks: channel_family enum aligns with contact_channel_catalog
contact_legal_basis enum aligns with contact_compliance_matrix and contact_source_policy_catalog
contact_compliance_matrix covers ALLOW_PREVIEW/REVIEW_REQUIRED/BLOCKED
contact_compliance_matrix explicitly separates candidate_compliance_decision and execution_compliance_decision
quiet_hours BLOCK keeps candidate preview but turns execution into SCHEDULED
frequency BLOCK and approval-required execution without approval turn execution into REVIEW_REQUIRED without blocking candidate preview
restricted channel_family forces review_required
legal basis review/blocked prevents outreach execution
stage8 compliance decision fields remain internal/governance only in field policy and do not enter sales or leadpack surfaces

suites.title: 阶段 8 触达执行细则回归
checks: contact_priority_policy_catalog present
outreach_cadence_catalog present
retry_policy_catalog present
touch_stop_condition_catalog present
outreach_cadence_catalog single-sources retry_policy_id/stop_policy_id and channel ladder/fallback sequence
feedback_reason_catalog present and consumed in stage8 writeback path
OUT-005/OUT-006/OUT-007/OUT-008/OUT-009/OUT-010 rule codes present
contact_policy_catalog includes priority outputs and cadence/retry/stop refs
contact_compliance_matrix covers reasonable_expectation_status and conflict flag
contact_target schema persists opportunity/source/priority/conflict fields for audit and replay
outreach_plan schema persists cadence/retry/approval_run/writeback/governed preview fields
touch_record schema persists attempt/feedback/writeback/governed metadata fields

suites.title: Stage 8 pre-route 行为回归
checks: contact priority/conflict behavior is executable and traceable
cadence and retry outputs are observable in runtime behavior
channel ladder and fallback sequence are observable in outreach_cadence runtime trace
stop condition blocks execution on opt-out or policy block
feedback reason and typed writeback targets are observable in runtime behavior
quiet hours, frequency review, approval gap and retry exhaustion remain distinct candidate vs execution compliance behaviors
CONNECTED/ORG_ROUTED human handoff paths keep H-08 minimum payload, writeback projection and human_handoff owner/SLA/reason authoritative
failure/writeback fields and H-08 payload readiness are checkable before route-map start
run-golden directly executes Stage8 failure/writeback and H-08 payload goldens

suites.title: 阶段 9 异常流与回写 taxonomy 回归
checks: payment_exception_catalog present
delivery_exception_catalog present
outcome_taxonomy_catalog present
governance_feedback_policy_catalog present
PAY-903/PAY-904/PAY-905/DEL-903/DEL-904/DEL-905/OUT-902/GOV-902 rule codes present
D10/D11 taxonomy references aligned
archived/retrieval failure rules remain blocking
partial/rejected/redelivery paths remain review-required or blocked
payment_record schema persists payment proof/match/refund/writeback governed fields
delivery_record schema persists delivery_form/customer_ack/partial/resend/redeliver/writeback governed fields
opportunity_outcome_event persists feedback/trigger/action/writeback governed fields
governance_feedback_event persists feedback/writeback targets and governance policy impact fields

suites.title: Stage 9 pre-route 行为回归
checks: payment exception behavior is executable and not only catalog-defined, including CHARGEBACK_REVIEW
delivery exception behavior is executable and not only catalog-defined, including PARTIAL_DELIVERY / DELIVERY_REJECTED / ACK_TIMEOUT
outcome taxonomy keeps writeback_targets aligned with taxonomy entry
governance feedback taxonomy drives required_actions and impact_scope
payment_exception/delivery_exception/outcome_taxonomy/governance_taxonomy all appear in one stage9 decision chain
governance writeback targets remain additive/governed and do not override outcome writeback targets
payment and delivery exception writeback targets remain additive and visible in effective_writeback_targets
upstream feedback projected/advisory targets are exposed separately and merged only through resolved_effective_writeback_targets plus writeback_target_contracts
H-08 optional preview/writeback fields are consumed into Stage9 typed workflow when present
Stage9 remains INTERNAL_GOVERNED skeleton and does not imply live payment/delivery/refund execution
run-golden directly executes Stage9 consumer/executor/writeback goldens

suites.title: R4 internal surface / preview / draft-only 回归
checks: stage7/8/9 route and schema modules expose internal preview or draft-only envelopes
surface responses distinguish formal_object_refs from preview_projection
api routes consume typed objects and decision states without recomputing main judgment
stage8/stage9 surfaces keep blocked_by_default and live_execution_enabled=false
stage8 persisted replay keeps draft-only/internal-governed/blocked-by-default surface semantics after create_touch_record
stage8 persisted governed_context replays writeback and human handoff metadata without implying live execution
page_surface_states/review_action_catalog/workbench/button flow/export template remain aligned
internal preview contracts do not imply external-ready or live execution
